name: Logic Town
short_description: Does Jim like chocolate cake? WAS JANET WEARING A HAT!?! Solve exhilarating mysteries like these in Logic Town, a relaxing coffee-break puzzle game of pure deduction.
detailed_description:
🧩 Logic Town is a relaxing coffee-break puzzle game based on Einstein Puzzles (AKA Zebra Puzzles). In each puzzle you must follow the clues to carefully eliminate answers until you've found the truth!

🔁 By procedurally generating every puzzle and solution, the game guarantees an endless supply of challenging Logic Puzzles that require no guesswork.

🏆 After beating the story, take to the free play mode and battle for the best times against other players. Or tweak the parameters of the custom puzzle generator and come up with puzzle recipe of your own.

🐰 The animals of Logic Town need your help! Solve the puzzles to help them redecorate!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
